chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-462 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.8359/2021. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A.No.8360/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 19.07.2021. Mr. Babar Hussain Arain, Advocate for the applicant. == 1. Urgency is disposed of. 2to4. It is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that the private respondents have detained Mst. Ramsha Asghar illegally at District Shaheed Benazirabad. No cogent reason is advanced by the applicant for approaching this Court directly without exhausting the remedy, which is available to him before learned Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad. Office is therefore directed to transmit the instant miscellaneous application forthwith to Sessions Judge Shaheed Benazirabad for its disposal in accordance with Law. J U D G E Muhammad Danish Steno*
